archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Retro Gaming

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid (Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with tight gap-4 or gap-6 for Nuzlocke Dashboard. Generous spacing (py-24) for Hero.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 for cards with borders.

surfaces.cards: Solid flat background bg-[#141417] with 1px border-white/5
surfaces.emulator_container: Solid black bg-black border border-[#27272A] hover:border-emerald-500/50 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.05)] transition-all

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-600 text-white font-medium px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-emerald-500 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-400
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:text-white hover:border-gray-500 transition-colors px-6 py-2 rounded-md

hp_bar.container: h-2 w-full bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden border border-gray-900

components.status_badge: px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
components.encounter_card: bg-[#141417] p-4 rounded-lg border border-white/5 flex items-center justify-between hover:border-white/10 transition-colors

image_urls.description: Abstract swirling green and black patterns for the landing page hero section. Use with bg-[#0A0A0C]/80 overlay for readability.
Close up of a retro gameboy on a table for the featured emulator/library section.
Gameboy Advance SP image for library or recent ROM placeholders.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-0.5) and border highlight for interactive cards.
interactions_and_motion.menus: Use radix UI primitives via shadcn for accessible focus and keyboard navigation.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure HP/Status colors pass contrast checks against dark backgrounds.
accessibility.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-rom-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML + Tailwind for unique Nuzlocke tracker layouts (e.g., HP bars, Party layout). Do NOT force Shadcn cards if they constrain the layout.
Implement Shadcn for functional elements like dialogs, tabs (Run history), selects (Platform/Core).
Ensure the Play Page emphasizes the Emulator canvas using a deep black container with a subtle green glow when active.
Create a Pokemon-style HP bar component with green/yellow/red logic based on percentage.
Use Outfit for headers, IBM Plex Sans for body, and JetBrains Mono for stats/HP numbers.
Follow the defined dark theme strictly, avoiding pure white except for highest emphasis text.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all key interactive elements.
